content.text:
Based on the image provided, I can clearly identify atom C:17 (carbon with index 17) and its neighboring atoms. Looking at the molecular structure:

Atom C:17 is connected to:
- C:9 (carbon atom with index 9)
- C:12 (carbon atom with index 12)
- C:16 (carbon atom with index 16)

These three atoms are directly bonded to C:17 via covalent bonds, as shown by the connecting lines in the molecular structure.

Regarding the geomconf_index, based on the file name "geomconf_1202.xyz" in the working directory, the geomconf_index for this molecule is 1202.

So the neighbor atoms of atom 17 (C) are:
- Atom index 9, element C
- Atom index 12, element C  
- Atom index 16, element C

Geomconf_index: 1202

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 17, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
